rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF PING YAU TSANG
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #3, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
rulings.Rulings: continued to 3/17/20. the petition can be granted, but a new order is required that does the following: all references to the petition must be to the Third Amended Third and Final Account; all references to distributions for Jaylen Tsang must state to Jin Di Guan, as Guardian of the Estate of Jaylen Tsang; the attorney's statutory fee amount must be corrected to reflect the reduction of $520; the calculation of distributon must be redone to reflect the reduced statutory fees and to order one lump sum certain to each party instead of listing the distribution account by account. the new order must be received by noon on 3/10/20 in order to avoid an automatic continuance.
